items.title: Swiss Franc falls vs USD, climbs against Euro in mixed trade
items.summary: The Swiss Franc extends its losses for the fifth straight trading day against the Greenback, down 0.15%, as risk appetite sours amid the AI rout and expectations that the Federal Reserve could raise rates later this year
items.title_ko: 스위스 프랑 대 USD 하락, 혼합 거래에서 유로 대비 상승
items.summary_ko: 스위스 프랑은 올해 말 연방준비제도 (Fed) 가 금리를 인상할 수 있다는 기대와 인공지능 (AI) 노선 속에서 위험 선호도가 높아짐에 따라 0.15% 하락한 그린백에 대해 5거래일 연속 손실을 연장한다.

items.title: United States Dollar Index climbs to its highest level since May 2025 on Fed hike bets
items.summary: The US Dollar Index (DXY), which tracks the Greenback's value against a basket of six major currencies, extends its rally on Tuesday, climbing to its highest level since May 2025. At the time of writing, the index trades
